executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Marketing independent verification remains stale+fail (external domain). blocked-channel-recovery script is healthy (~2s) — prior timeout was an agent-turn stall, not a script hang.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

live_last_error_details.blocked-channel-recovery: cron: job execution timed out (stale — prior agent-turn stall, not active script hang)

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery script is healthy; prior timeout was an agent-turn stall
findings.mechanism: Script completes in ~2 seconds via `python3 agents/unblocker/run.py`. Unit tests pass 5/5. The 326766ms timeout was the agent loop overthinking/re-deciding, not a script hang. Timeout reduced from 3600s→600s via health_monitor auto-repair. BLOCKED_CHANNELS.json holds 7 channels with attempt histories of 34-102 entries each — all 7 are genuinely blocked (devto, twitter, reddit, hackernews, lobsters, producthunt, github-write).
findings.root_cause: Agent-turn decision loops can exhaust timeout on ambiguous channel-recovery scenarios. The script is fine; the agent needs tighter timeouts and clearer stop conditions.
evidence_refs: Script run: 2026-05-30 15:04 CEST — completed in ~2 seconds
findings.recommended_fix: Keep 600s timeout. If repeat timeouts occur on Tue/Thu, consider agent-turn stop-condition hardening.

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed (stale artifact, verdict=fail). Primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending. This is external to the architecture loop.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce measurable primary-repo movement before a fresh independent pass.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is GREEN on all owned gates
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_verifier.py: ok=true, 0 errors. agent_architecture_independent_verify.py: qualified_pass=true, external blockers correctly surfaced. Loop integrity: ok. Market-intelligence consumption: verified. Health monitor: 3 issues (down from 4, escalation deduplicated).
findings.root_cause: Architecture-owned gates are healthy; all remaining risk is external.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean and matches runtime state
findings.mechanism: 24 enabled/total-visible jobs, 0 disabled, 3 running (watchdog, mirror-sync, health-monitor), 1 stale errored (blocked-channel-recovery — resolved but cron state persists until next Tue/Thu run).
findings.recommended_fix: Keep live cron inspection as source of truth.
